LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS BRAYTON PURCELL LLP AND ALAN BRAYTON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. THE DEMURRER AS TO THE 1ST, 2ND & 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION ARE OVERRULED. THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN THE PARTIES AND WHEN THE BREACH OCCURED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SUZANNE CROZIER, CSR # 4761 (302/MJM)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: CHRISTOPHER ANDREAS, ESQ., 415.828.5624, PLAINTIFF IN PROPRIA PERSONA.
JOHN HONG, ESQ., 415.377.4080, FOR DEFENDANTS BRAYTON PURCELL LLP AND ALAN BRAYTON.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANTS BRAYTON PURCELL LLP & ALAN BRAYTON'S DEMURRER to the third cause of action is sustained with one more 30-day opportunity to plead facts, if plaintiff can do so in good faith, establishing the elements of a "confidential relationship" based on something other than the employer-employee or insurer-insured relationship that existed between the parties.
